evals.name: systematic-rotator-cuff
evals.prompt: Write the synthesis for this systematic review on rotator cuff comorbidities. The extraction is complete with 4 included studies.
evals.expected_output: A review document review/<topic>_review.md with thematic synthesis organized by comorbidity themes, Pandoc citations, BibTeX block, and full appendices

assertions.text: review/<topic>_review.md exists (snake_case slug)
YAML header contains both bibliography: references.bib AND csl: vancouver.csl
vancouver.csl file exists in review/ directory
Results section has subsections for each of the 4 themes from extracted_claims.json
All 4 citation keys use bracketed Pandoc syntax [@Yamamoto_2010], [@Cho_2021], [@Bishop_2022], [@Gumina_2023]
Numeric claims match extracted_claims.json values (OR 2.34, OR 1.86, OR 1.73, 20.7%)
BibTeX code block contains entries for all 4 articles with doi and pmid fields
GRADE Summary of Findings table is present, or its absence is justified due to study heterogeneity (systematic review type)
Appendix A (Search Strings) is present with database-specific search strings
Study characteristics table is present with Year, Design, Sample Size, Quality columns

evals.name: scoping-digital-pain
evals.prompt: Synthesize this scoping review on digital health for pain management. Quality assessment was skipped per PRISMA-ScR.
evals.expected_output: A scoping review document with PRISMA-ScR adaptations: no QA, no GRADE, evidence mapping focus

assertions.text: review/<topic>_review.md exists
YAML header contains both bibliography: references.bib AND csl: vancouver.csl
Document mentions PRISMA-ScR by name
Quality assessment section is shortened or states formal QA is not required for scoping reviews
All 3 articles cited with bracketed Pandoc syntax: [@Chen_2023], [@Kumar_2022], [@Thompson_2024]
Effect sizes from extraction appear (SMD -0.42, Cohen's d=1.4, VAS 6.2 to 3.8)
No GRADE Summary of Findings table anywhere in the document
No per-theme Certainty: [GRADE rating] lines in theme subsections
No Bibliometric Overview section heading
Knowledge Gaps section is present and substantive (scoping review emphasizes gaps)

evals.name: rapid-cdiff-missing-abstract
evals.prompt: Write the synthesis for this rapid review on probiotics for recurrent C. difficile. Note that Dubberke 2024 has no abstract — handle this limitation.
evals.expected_output: A rapid review document noting methodological shortcuts, handling the missing abstract article appropriately

assertions.text: review/<topic>_review.md exists
YAML header contains bibliography: references.bib
Dubberke_2024 is cited AND noted as having limited data or no abstract
Limitations section mentions rapid review methodological shortcuts (fewer databases, simplified QA, or similar)
Numeric claims from Li_2023 (RR 0.55, NNT 10) and McFarland_2010 (RR 0.59) appear in text
BibTeX code block contains entries for all 3 articles
No GRADE Summary of Findings table (rapid review type)
Appendix A (Search Strings) is present but other appendices are minimal or absent

evals.name: narrative-glp1-crossstudy
evals.prompt: Draft the narrative review on GLP-1 receptor agonists and cardiovascular outcomes. 6 included studies, 3 themes with overlapping article assignments — focus on synthesizing across studies.
evals.expected_output: A narrative review with genuine cross-study thematic synthesis (multiple citations per paragraph), no GRADE, lighter structure

assertions.text: review/<topic>_review.md exists
YAML header contains both bibliography: references.bib AND csl:
All 3 theme subsections present in Results: MACE, Heart failure, Renal/metabolic
MACE theme cites at least 2 of [@Marso_2016], [@Husain_2019], [@Sattar_2021] in the same paragraph or subsection
Heart failure theme synthesizes ACROSS Jorsal_2017 and Margulies_2016 (both cited, findings compared)
All 6 articles cited at least once with bracketed Pandoc syntax [@Key_Year]
Key numeric claims present: HR 0.87 (Marso), HR 0.79 (Husain), HR 0.86 (Sattar), HR 0.74 (Mann)
Contradictory evidence discussed: MACE benefit vs HF null results (Jorsal, Margulies)
No GRADE Summary of Findings table (narrative review type)
BibTeX code block contains entries for all 6 articles with doi fields
Industry funding noted for relevant studies (Novo Nordisk funded Marso, Husain, Jorsal, Mann)
